title: Self-similar dendrites with finite boundary and P-sprouts

title: Feature leakage and the identifiability of direct-dependency entropy models of neural activity

title: A flexibility result for polynomial entropy of pointwise periodic homeomorphisms
summary: We construct a family of continua and pointwise periodic homeomorphisms realizing arbitrary polynomial entropy values in $[0,+\infty]$. In particular, this provides examples of pointwise periodic homeomorphisms with positive polynomial entropy.
